character.name: Alptuğ ILDIZ
character.description: Hi! I'm Alptuğ, a software engineer passionate about creating user-friendly, interactive, and visually appealing interfaces using modern web technologies. I mainly work with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, and also provide effective solutions using technologies like Vue.js, PHP, and SQL when needed. I enjoy building software focused on performance, simplicity, and a great user experience.

items.title: Frontend Engineer
items.description: Architecting high-performance web interfaces with React.js and Next.js. Shipping production-grade UI systems within distributed agile teams — zero downtime, maximum impact.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Delivered enterprise-scale features across the full stack with JavaScript and PHP. Bridged backend logic and pixel-perfect frontends — obsessing over UX at every layer.

items.title: Software Engineer
items.description: Digitized factory-floor operations by engineering real-time production tracking systems in JavaScript. Turned analog workflows into data-driven dashboards.

items.title: Freelance Frontend Developer
items.description: Crafting custom web experiences for clients worldwide. React, Next.js, TypeScript — fast, accessible, and built to last.
